title: Vanilla PVP presets
description: You can switch between Vanilla and Non-Vanilla modes.  DrDonut uses  this during his streams. This could be used for when you would want to be in vanilla mode or non-vanilla which is basically PvP mode.
body:
Vanilla PVP Presets

Vanilla PVP Presets is a lightweight Minecraft mod that enables players to switch between Vanilla Mode and Non-Vanilla Mode with a keybind.

This mod is useful for players looking to switch between the Vanilla mode visuals and the optimized settings for PvP mode gameplay.

The default keybind for this mod is F9 and can be changed via the Minecraft controls menu.

Vanilla Mode

Explosion particles

Normal fire height

View bobbing

Damage tilt

FOV effects

Non-Vanilla Mode

Explosion particles disabled

Low fire is enabled

View bobbing disabled

Damage tilt disabled

FOV effects disabled

why use ths mod

This mod enables players to quickly switch between vanilla mode and non vanilla mode to play with the visuals they want
